# Abdussamad Farooq Saeed

> Personal portfolio for Abdussamad Farooq Saeed, a Senior AI Engineer in Al-Khobar, Saudi Arabia focused on production LLM systems, agentic workflows, Arabic NLP, computer vision, and CUDA/HPC infrastructure.

## Primary Resources

- [Portfolio Home](https://code5717.github.io/) - Overview, experience, selected projects, background, and contact links.
- [Resume PDF](https://code5717.github.io/RESUME-ABDUSSAMAD-APRIL-2026.pdf) - Current resume for recruiters, collaborators, and agents summarizing professional experience.

## Project Links

- [Programming Language from Scratch](https://code5717.github.io/a7-py) - Public write-up and implementation notes for a custom language project.
- [High Performance Custom Compiler (Rotate)](https://code5717.github.io/rotate) - Static typed programming language with recursive descent compiler in C and C++.
- [Arraylist for C](https://code5717.github.io/Arraylist) - Documentation site for a type-safe dynamic array library in C.
- [a7-py source](https://github.com/code5717/a7-py) - Compiler and language implementation repository.
- [Rotate source](https://github.com/code5717/rotate) - Rotate language compiler repository.
- [Arraylist source](https://github.com/code5717/Arraylist) - Arraylist for C library and documentation site source.
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/code5717) - Broader project archive and source repositories.
